name: Dates

pros.title: still brings some useful minerals
pros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit.

pros.title: can be useful in high-energy contexts
pros.explanation: There are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful.

pros.title: still a recognisable whole fruit
pros.explanation: That matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.

cons.title: sugar density is a major category problem
cons.explanation: Fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard.

cons.title: glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit
cons.explanation: Much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour.

cons.title: dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher
cons.explanation: This is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
